summary: Session 2 of 2 (FINAL, close-out + re-scope). Operator UAT of the S1 build surfaced that the entire Getting Started / scaffolder UX is being redesigned (operator mockup docs/planning/getting-started-instructions.svg) — a stateful two-panel Getting Started (interactive form in the Session Set Explorer + static editor instructions) that removes the 'title of the first session set' prompt this set kept. The S1 activation + wizard-tier fix is merged and VERIFIED on master; rather than cut a throwaway standalone 0.28.1 for a scaffolder flow about to be replaced, the release folds forward into Set 060 (0.29.0). This session: re-scoped the spec's S2; annotated CHANGELOG [0.28.1] as not-released-standalone (folded into 0.29.0); authored change-log.md with the Set 060 hand-off and the operator-approved redesign design lock; no new code, no release. TS unit 645 passing / 2 pre-existing Set-026 stub failures; drift_guard exits 0.
verification_notes: No new code this session — administrative close-out + re-scope only. The set's only code (S1: the activation + wizard-tier fix) was cross-provider VERIFIED by gpt-5-4 over 2 rounds (see s1-verification.md / -round-2.md). The re-scope decision (fold the release into Set 060 rather than ship a soon-obsolete 0.28.1) was operator-approved 2026-06-10.
